case_title: THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ALIOTO JOHN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $316.17 FILED BY THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN $316.17 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $352.17 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN HEARING SET FOR JUN-28-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-28-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY CLUB OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN $175.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO JOHN
